Cell.Data: PLAYER_INTERACTION_VANGUARD

The DEV TEAM / MISC NOTES column contains info on what text between { } signs means (if applicable). It usually stands for either a numeric value, or a numeric value with an icon. Text between [ ] signs stands for a certain type of icon.
SCENE ID
TEXT ID
ENGLISH STRING
LOCALIZED STRING
ALTERNATIVE ENGLISH STRING
ALTERNATIVE LOCALIZED STRING
LOCALIZATION NOTES
DEV TEAM / MISC NOTES
HEADER
GREET_FIRSTMEET_NEGATIVE_01
We know your kind, criminal scum, and we’re not taking any chances with you. State your purpose and destination before we blow a brand new hole in your torso.
Znamy twój rodzaj, zbrodnicza szumowino, i nie będziemy ryzykować. Podaj swój cel i mów, dokąd zmierzasz, zanim zrobimy ci nową dziurę w piersi.

This text refers to a person that can either be male or female. If relevant for translation, please use the ‘localized string’ column for the male text and the ‘alternative localized string’ column for the female text.
HEADER
GREET_FIRSTMEET_NEGATIVE_02
{STR_leaderName}, you’ve got a snowball’s chance in hell to convince me you’re nothing but a lowlife. But the Vanguard is all about second chances. How would you like to use yours?
{STR_leaderName}, za nic w świecie mnie nie przekonasz, że jesteś czymś więcej niż kryminalistą. Ale Awangarda daje drugą szansę. Chcesz wykorzystać swoją?

This text refers to a person that can either be male or female. If relevant for translation, please use the ‘localized string’ column for the male text and the ‘alternative localized string’ column for the female text.
HEADER
GREET_FIRSTMEET_NEGATIVE_03
The Vanguard was created to suppress threats just like you. The Star Union’s greatness may have faded, but we fight for its hope and ideals. Crossing us just puts you in the line of fire. Be careful.

Awangarda powstała, żeby zajmować się zagrożeniami takimi jak ty. Być może chwała Związku Gwiezdnego już przeminęła, ale walczymy o jego nadzieje i ideały. Nadepnij nam na odcisk, a znajdziesz się na linii ognia. Uważaj.

This text refers to a person that can either be male or female. If relevant for translation, please use the ‘localized string’ column for the male text and the ‘alternative localized string’ column for the female text.
HEADER
GREET_FIRSTMEET_NEUTRAL_01
{STR_leaderName}, is it? What can we do for you? Make it snappy, if you don’t mind. We’ve got afternoon drills in sixteen minutes.
{STR_leaderName}, tak? Co możemy dla ciebie zrobić? Tylko krótko, jeśli możesz. Za szesnaście minut mamy popołudniową musztrę.

This text refers to a person that can either be male or female. If relevant for translation, please use the ‘localized string’ column for the male text and the ‘alternative localized string’ column for the female text.
HEADER
GREET_FIRSTMEET_NEUTRAL_02
Greetings, stranger. You’ve found the Vanguard vox-com channel. Note that this link is being traced, so no funny business. So, who are you? And what have you come here to do?
Witaj, nieznajomy. To kanał komunikacji głosowej Awangardy. Informujemy, że linia jest monitorowana, więc żadnych numerów. A więc, kim jesteś? I co zamierasz tu robić?

This text refers to a person that can either be male or female. If relevant for translation, please use the ‘localized string’ column for the male text and the ‘alternative localized string’ column for the female text.
HEADER
GREET_FIRSTMEET_NEUTRAL_03

Hello there, {STR_leaderName}. I represent the Vanguard in diplomatic matters, so we can talk politics if necessary. We may not be the Star Union, but we’re the closest you’ll get to that level of stability.

{STR_leaderName}, witaj. Reprezentuję Awangardę w kwestiach dyplomatycznych. więc możemy porozmawiać o polityce, jeśli trzeba. Może nie jesteśmy Związkiem Gwiezdnym, ale nie znajdziesz organizacji bardziej stabilnej od nas.

This text refers to a person that can either be male or female. If relevant for translation, please use the ‘localized string’ column for the male text and the ‘alternative localized string’ column for the female text.
HEADER
GREET_FIRSTMEET_POSITIVE_01
Good day, commander {STR_leaderName}. To what do we owe the pleasure? We’d be happy to give you some pointers if you’re drawing up battle plans. The Vanguard always stands ready.
{STR_leaderName}, dobrego dnia. Czemu zawdzięczamy tę przyjemność? Chętnie damy ci kilka wskaźników, jeśli chcesz narysować plan bitwy. Awangarda zawsze jest gotowa.

This text refers to a person that can either be male or female. If relevant for translation, please use the ‘localized string’ column for the male text and the ‘alternative localized string’ column for the female text.
HEADER
GREET_FIRSTMEET_POSITIVE_02
Good to meet you, general. From the vid-snaps I’ve seen, you run a tight ship over there. The Vanguard could use an ally like you. Can’t rebuild an empire alone, eh?
Dobrze cię spotkać, generale. Z nagrań wnioskuję, że rządzisz u siebie twardą ręką. Awangardzie przydałby się taki sprzymierzeniec. Nie można samemu odbudowac imperium, prawda?

This text refers to a person that can either be male or female. If relevant for translation, please use the ‘localized string’ column for the male text and the ‘alternative localized string’ column for the female text.
HEADER
GREET_NEUTRAL_01
Hail, commander. I’ll warn you now, my guys and girls are not the most patient types, and neither am I, so let’s make this snappy. Unless you want to test the limits of said patience?

Witaj, dowódco. Ostrzegę cię od razu, że moi chłopcy i dziewczęta nie należą do najcierpliwszych, a o mnie można powiedzieć to samo, więc nie lawirujmy. Chyba, że chcesz sprawdzić, jak daleko sięgają granice naszej cierpliwości?

This text refers to a person that can either be male or female. If relevant for translation, please use the ‘localized string’ column for the male text and the ‘alternative localized string’ column for the female text.
HEADER
GREET_NEUTRAL_02
Good morning, general. You speak with the Vanguard legion. We’ve been asleep for too long, and we’re ready to become players on the galactic stage again. Let’s begin the discussion.
Dzień dobry, generale. Rozmawiasz z legionem Awangardy. Spaliśmy już za długo i jesteśmy gotowi, by na powrót wejść na galaktyczną scenę. Przystąpmy do rozmów.

This text refers to a person that can either be male or female. If relevant for translation, please use the ‘localized string’ column for the male text and the ‘alternative localized string’ column for the female text.
HEADER
GREET_TRADE_PROPOSE_NEUTRAL_01
I’ve been authorized to extend the terms of a trade deal to you. What do you think of this?
Upoważniono mnie do zaproponowania wam tej oto umowy handlowej. Co o tym sądzicie?

This text refers to a person that can either be male or female. If relevant for translation, please use the ‘localized string’ column for the male text and the ‘alternative localized string’ column for the female text.
HEADER
GREET_TRADE_RECEIVED_01
10-4, trade request received. My quartermaster has been notified.
10-4, potwierdzam otrzymanie propozycji handlowej. Powiadomiliśmy naszego kwatermistrza.

This text refers to a person that can either be male or female. If relevant for translation, please use the ‘localized string’ column for the male text and the ‘alternative localized string’ column for the female text.
ACTION
DECLARE_WAR_01

I am required by galactic law to notify you of our declaration of war upon you and your people. {STR_reasons}. This is in order to give you ample time to mobilize your forces. Not that that will do any good.
Prawo galaktyczne wymaga, abyśmy powiadomili was o wypowiedzeniu wojny waszej frakcji. {STR_reasons}. Ma to na celu zapewnić wam wystarczający czas na mobilizację sił. Nie żeby wam to coś pomogło.

{STR_reasons} is a list of reasons, written like "You trespassed" and can be found in this excel sheet. This text refers to a person that can either be male or female. If relevant for translation, please use the ‘localized string’ column for the male text and the ‘alternative localized string’ column for the female text.
ACTION
DECLARE_WAR_02
That’s it! I’ve had it up to here with you. {STR_reasons}. I’m coming over there to root you out of your hole. Get ready to die, you flaming hog-monkey!
Dość tego! Za długo już się z tobą cackam. {STR_reasons}. Ruszamy wykurzyć was z waszych dziur. Gotujcie się na śmierć, cholerne pawiany!

{STR_reasons} is a list of reasons, written like "You trespassed" and can be found in this excel sheet. This text refers to a person that can either be male or female. If relevant for translation, please use the ‘localized string’ column for the male text and the ‘alternative localized string’ column for the female text.
ACTION
INSULT_01
Poor discipline. Failing composure. Lack of a spine. All traits of a first-week recruit about to wash out of the academy. And you, of course.
Kiepska dyscyplina. Niedostateczne opanowanie. Brak kręgosłupa. Wszystko to są cechy świeżego rekruta, którego za chwilę wyleją z akademii. I wasze cechy, rzecz jasna.

This text refers to a person that can either be male or female. If relevant for translation, please use the ‘localized string’ column for the male text and the ‘alternative localized string’ column for the female text.
ACTION
INSULT_02
That the Star Union ever birthed your failure of a society is a black mark that I hope to be able to erase one day. Watch your back, trash.
To, że Związek Gwiezdny wydał na świat tak żałosne społeczeństwo, jest plamą na honorze, którą mam nadzieję pewnego dnia zmazać. Pilnujcie swoich pleców, śmiecie.

This text refers to a person that can either be male or female. If relevant for translation, please use the ‘localized string’ column for the male text and the ‘alternative localized string’ column for the female text.
ACTION
INSULT_03
What is your major malfunction, soldier?! The crud on my dog’s paws would make a more competent leader than you! If I were you, I’d have shot myself into the sun years ago!
Skąd się biorą wasze niedostatki, żołnierzu?! Paskudztwo na łapie mojego psa byłoby lepszym dowódcą niż wy! Na waszym miejscu już dawno wystrzeliłbym się prosto w słońce!

This text refers to a person that can either be male or female. If relevant for translation, please use the ‘localized string’ column for the male text and the ‘alternative localized string’ column for the female text.
ACTION
DECLARE_FRIENDSHIP_01
I salute you, commander {STR_leaderName}. You have led your population to success and prosperity, embodying the very ideals that the Star Union originally strived towards. Keep up the good work!
Pozdrawiam was, dowódco {STR_leaderName}. Doprowadziliście swoją ludność do sukcesu i rozkwitu, będąc wcieleniem ideałów, do których dążył niegdyś Związek Gwiezdny. Tak trzymać!

This text refers to a person that can either be male or female. If relevant for translation, please use the ‘localized string’ column for the male text and the ‘alternative localized string’ column for the female text.
ACTION
DECLARE_FRIENDSHIP_02
Well now, I’m not one for compliments, but I have to hand it to you. You’ve really got all your ducks in a row over there. Hell, even my quartermasters are envious of your organization!

No cóż, nie mam w zwyczaju prawić komplementów, ale muszę przyznać, że się wam należą. Naprawdę macie u siebie wszystko dobrze poukładane. Do czarta, nawet moi kwatermistrzowie zazdroszczą wam sprawnej organizacji!

This text refers to a person that can either be male or female. If relevant for translation, please use the ‘localized string’ column for the male text and the ‘alternative localized string’ column for the female text.
ACTION
DECLARE_FRIENDSHIP_03
Now there is a proud and respectable commander worthy of praise! I’m gonna take some lessons from your leadership style to sharpen my own program. Thanks for the inspiration!
Oto dumny i godny szacunku dowódca, któremu należy się pochwała! Będę czerpać naukę z waszego stylu dowodzenia, aby ulepszyć mój własny program. Dziękuję za inspirację!

This text refers to a person that can either be male or female. If relevant for translation, please use the ‘localized string’ column for the male text and the ‘alternative localized string’ column for the female text.
TRADE
ACCEPT_KINDLY_POSITIVE
Affirmative on the deal. Proceed to the designated offloading strip.
Potwierdzam naszą umowę. Proszę skierować się na wyznaczone stanowisko wyładowcze.

This text refers to a person that can either be male or female. If relevant for translation, please use the ‘localized string’ column for the male text and the ‘alternative localized string’ column for the female text.
TRADE
ACCEPT_DOUBTFUL
Just get on with the exchange already. I don’t have the luxury of wasting time chit-chatting with you.
Przejdźcie do rzeczy i mówcie, o co chodzi. Nie mogę sobie pozwolić na marnowanie czasu na pogaduszki z wami.

This text refers to a person that can either be male or female. If relevant for translation, please use the ‘localized string’ column for the male text and the ‘alternative localized string’ column for the female text.
TRADE
DECLINE_IMBALANCE_01
That’s a negatory! You’ll have to do better than that, friend.
To nie przejdzie! Musicie się lepiej postarać, przyjaciele.

This text refers to a person that can either be male or female. If relevant for translation, please use the ‘localized string’ column for the male text and the ‘alternative localized string’ column for the female text.
TRADE
DECLINE_IMBALANCE_02
That’s a terrible deal. You should be ashamed to even offer that. Try again, cupcake!
To okropna oferta. Powinniście się wstydzić, że proponujecie coś takiego. Spróbujcie jeszcze raz, pączusiu!

This text refers to a person that can either be male or female. If relevant for translation, please use the ‘localized string’ column for the male text and the ‘alternative localized string’ column for the female text.

Note that all the texts in this document that refer to two people - the speaker and the one spoken too - that can both be male or female.
Note that use of the 'localized' and 'alternative localized string' only applies for the gender of the speaker.
If the gender of the person spoken to requires inflection, please try to translate the text in a way that doesn't require such inflection. If this is impossible, please get in touch with us informing us of which lines this concerns and how they would be inflected in the language you are translating too.
